codeReview.summary: Confirmed that the proxy auth gating denies unauthenticated requests and correctly forwards authenticated GET /api/shell/bootstrap requests, preserving original properties. JWT validation properly uses the Ed25519 auth public key and injects X-Authenticated-User.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker generated specific library documentation file (.factory/library/proxy-bootstrap-auth-gating.md).

summary: Implementation thoroughly fulfills all requirements detailed in the expected behavior section of the feature, and tests are robust and cover edge cases effectively. No blockers or uncertainties remain.
